name: 1'8"x2'10" Rectangle Striped Rug - Room Essentials™
description:
Complete any room's decor with the timeless charm of this Rectangle Striped Rug from Room Essentials™. This accent rug showcases a striped pattern in multi-pastel shades, adding a bright pop of color to your indoor space. Crafted with a polyurethane-rubber blend with rubber backing, it features a flat pile height for versatile placement throughout your home. Use it in your entryway to create a welcoming vibe or to accent spaces like a reading nook or small desk.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
